---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the parser, docs, or packaging
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the problem you are trying to solve.

## Proposed change

Describe the behavior or API you would like to see.

## Example input or output

Share a Markdown sample, Block Kit payload shape, or documentation example if helpful.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any workarounds or alternative approaches you evaluated.

## Additional context

Add links, screenshots, or related issues here.
